metadata.description: Paul's custom Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: paul-os
plugins.description: Harness engineering plugin for systematic product development with AI agent teams. Supports multiple tech stacks, customizable pipelines, quality benchmarking, and runtime observation (Docker + Loki + Prometheus + Grafana + agent-browser). Integrates SDD, TDD, and ontology-based knowledge management. Includes agent self-tuning, upstream feedback loops, and retrospective automation.
